title: JoWY's Custom GUI Experience Bars Pack
description: A collection of different GUI textures for the experience bar, use the one you like the most.
body:
A collection of different GUI textures for the experience bar.

You can choose or download them all if you want, but only the one at the top of the Resource Packs tab in Minecraft will be active.

There are 4 versions at the moment:

> 01 - Minimalist Static

> 02 - Minimalist Animated

> 03 - Minimalist Rainbow Static

> 04 - Minimalist Rainbow Animated
